summary.problemSummary: Сайт юридической фирмы перегружен разрозненными trust blocks, слабой page hierarchy и неоднозначной service framing, но case не был признан безопасно buildable для demo path.
beforeWeaknesses: Ключевые services и expertise areas распределены фрагментарно и требуют сильной manual synthesis.
Trust layer опирается на неполные и потенциально регуляторно чувствительные claims.
Observed complexity and confidence do not support a safe buildable demo path.
changeSummary: Рекомендуется упростить hierarchy practice areas и clearer consultation CTA path.
Рекомендуется пересобрать trust layer вокруг verified credentials and case framing only.
No after-state is claimed because this dossier remains audit-only.

preservedConstraints: Не выдумывать legal outcomes, testimonials или credentials beyond verified content.
Не изображать реализованный after-state без preview artifact.
Не расширять case в buildable demo без новой qualification/decision pass.

externalFlowHandling.notes: External booking or app flow was not a primary factor in this audit-only case.

before.summary: Current site spreads core legal offers across dense copy blocks, making the core offer hard to scan and hard to prioritize.

evidence.caption: Before: fragmented service framing on legal services site.

findings.notes: Recommended change is documented in summary, but no implemented after-state exists.

assumptions: Further review would be needed before any buildable demo path could be justified.
nonGoals: Do not imply that a preview or after-state exists.
Do not fabricate legal outcomes, staff bios or testimonials.
Do not reinterpret audit recommendations as implemented improvements.
